data.title: DUPR and USA Pickleball reach a historic agreement, making DUPR the exclusive rating system for all USAP events.
data.description: Delray Beach, Florida - On December 5, 2025, DUPR (Dynamic Universal Pickleball Rating) and USA Pickleball (USAP) revealed a significant collaboration, designating DUPR as the official and exclusive rating system for all USA Pickleball-owned events. This partnership establishes DUPR as the premier rating system for USAP, influencing a wide range of events and activities.

data.title: Intruder uses DomainTools' DNSDB to enhance attack surface discovery. Largest passive DNS database used.
data.description: In London, an intruder has utilized DomainTools data to enhance attack surface discovery on organizations' full external perimeters. Specifically, Intruder is leveraging DNSDB, the world's largest passive DNS database, to achieve a significantly wider coverage in their efforts. This initiative aims to close the visibility gap and improve overall cybersecurity. The initial pilot program has demonstrated promising results, indicating a strong potential to enhance security measures. The use of DomainTools enables Intruder to provide best-in-class services in identifying and mitigating potential threats. This innovative approach signifies a pivotal step towards bolstering cybersecurity defenses.

data.title: UFC partners with Telegram for exclusive gift drop this weekend, bidding opens today and continues through Dec 7.
data.description: Miami-based creator and online influencer N3on has collaborated with messaging platform Telegram for a special Gift drop starting today. The auction will run until Sunday, December 7, coinciding with a live stream by N3on where fans can participate in real-time bidding. Telegram Gifts are digital assets that users can trade, share, and exhibit on their profiles within the Telegram app. This initiative marks a shift towards digital collectibles as a new status symbol, superseding traditional luxury items.

data.title: Dow rises after inflation data, Salesforce leads. Netflix stock falls post Warner Bros. deal.
data.description: Today, the Dow Jones index experienced a rise following the release of inflation data. In contrast, Netflix saw a decline in its stock after announcing a purchase agreement with Warner Bros. Salesforce stood out as a leader in the Dow's increase. The stock market today was characterized by these movements, with important numbers indicating the shifting landscape in the financial markets.

data.title: Deep Code SAS, controlled by Mr. Miroslaw Klaba, sells 3.6M shares (2.4% of OVHcloud) on December 5, 2025.
data.description: On December 5, 2025, OVHcloud confirmed the declaration made by Deep Code SAS, a company owned by Mr. Miroslaw Klaba, about the sale of 3.6 million shares. These shares constitute approximately 2.4% of the Group's total share capital.

data.title: Germany data center colocation market valued at USD 2.37B in 2024, projected to reach USD 5.36B by 2030 with a CAGR of 14.57%. 187 existing facilities by Dec 2024.
data.description: A recent report on the Germany Data Center Colocation Market, now available on ResearchAndMarkets.com, reveals that the market was worth USD 2.37 billion in 2024. It is anticipated to grow significantly and reach USD 5.36 billion by 2030, showing a Compound Annual Growth Rate (CAGR) of 14.57%. Germany stands out as a key player in the data center industry in Europe, boasting approximately 187 operational colocation data center facilities as of December 2024, with Frankfurt being a prominent hub.

data.title: RobotLAB opens Miami franchise on Dec. 5, 2025, strengthening presence in tech market. Expansion brings robotics, AI innovation to South Florida.
data.description: In a statement released on December 5th, 2025, RobotLAB, a prominent player in the field of commercial robotics integration, revealed the launch of its Miami franchise. This strategic move aims to enhance the company's footprint in a rapidly advancing technology and business hub within the United States. By establishing this new franchise, RobotLAB intends to provide essential support to businesses operating in this thriving market.

data.title: Global fly ash market expected to grow from USD 5.56 billion in 2024 to USD 5.98 billion in 2025, projected to reach USD 10.02 billion by 2032 with a CAGR of 7.64%. Industry focuses on sustainability and performance improvements.
data.description: In Dublin, the global fly ash market is experiencing substantial growth, with a value of USD 5.56 billion in 2024 that increased to USD 5.98 billion in 2025. Forecasts predict a further rise to USD 10.02 billion by 2032, indicating a projected compound annual growth rate (CAGR) of 7.64%. This growth is attributed to industry participants' efforts to incorporate fly ash into their offerings for environmental sustainability and enhanced performance.

data.title: Monotype unveils Pantone Color of the Year 2026, Cloud Dancer (PANTONE 11-4201), with Jensen Arabique typeface. NYC event on Dec 4, 2025.
data.description: The Pantone Color of the Year for 2026, PANTONE 11-4201 Cloud Dancer, was revealed on December 4, 2025, in New York City. This year, for the first time, its typographic representation was also unveiled. Monotype has paired this color with the resurrected Jensen Arabique typeface to evoke a sense of nostalgia.
